libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Keep tests self-contained with a loopback Vert.x HttpServer. In the test build, extend the existing nativeTest runtimeArgs setup for Vert.x 5.0.x / libraryVersion == '5.0.1' to include '-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow' and '-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true'. Do not add external services. Avoid OAuth2WebClient coverage unless intentionally adding the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency in test scope.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient is part of the public API but depends on optional vertx-auth-oauth2; tests that import or exercise OAuth2 support will need an explicit test dependency.

The system properties address the known Netty 4.2.x / Java 25 native runtime requirement; local Gradle and Native Image verification may still expose missing reachability metadata that must be fixed separately.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage; normal usage is an in-process Vert.x WebClient talking to an HTTP server. However, vertx-web-client 5.0.1 resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final, and the existing 5.0.0 scaffold already documents that Netty 4.2.x needs explicit unsafe-access runtime properties on Java 25 native runs.
